dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.

agents.summary: USD Layer 1 raw call generated from sealed independent workflow.

24h.reason: USD is given a bullish lean because the US 2-year yield is rising strongly, indicating Fed policy tightening expectations. However, risk-on conditions (VIX below 16 with falling VIX) and weakening DXY momentum provide bearish pressure, creating some conflict among primary drivers and limiting conviction. Several key inputs including US/Germany spread, US economic data surprise, and Fed bias are missing, further capping confidence. Overall, the directional lean is bullish but cautious.
